chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: This subchapter does not apply to a person issued a registration certificate under Chapter 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) , even if not all the operations of the person are performed under that certificate.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.150 — Nonapplicability of Subchapter

This subchapter does not apply to a person issued a registration certificate under Chapter 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) , even if not all the operations of the person are performed under that certificate.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.147, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*
